{{CargoOrgan
|name=Bio-Nuke Battery
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10812
|idx=13
|description="The core of the battery contains large amounts of plutonium that generate electricity as it decays, damaging its bearer's body with radiation!"
—TX Autopsy Report
|skill=
|hp=990
|def=94
|atk=59
|rush=165
|gene1=When in Mutant Form:
> Gain +2% Time Chests in explorations
|gene2=In Mecha Form, HP Regen +400 per round
|gene3=Snail Arena, Earth DMG +60
|gene7=When in Mutant Form:
> Gain +2% Time Chests in explorations (Awakened)
|}}
